printed.name: Lunge Forward
printed.setup: Standing upright facing Wunda Chair, one foot on Wunda Chair, leg bent, knee aligned over ankle, other foot placed on pedal, plantarflexed, leg straight

movement.inhale: Bend leg, lowering pedal, return to start position (without touching bottom)

cues: Keep hip joint aligned over pedal (as close as possible) and knee behind or aligned with toes when lifting and lowering pedal
